items.text: Put on your lab coat first
Keep your gloves on at all times

items.hint: 我准备好做科学实验了！

items.text: Safety first, always in the lab.
items.hint: 在实验室里，安全永远第一。

items.text: Hold the beaker with both hands

items.hint: 绝对不要用试管喝东西
这个工具是用来做什么的？

items.text: Every tool has a special purpose.
items.hint: 每件工具都有特别的用途。

items.text: Add one drop at a time
If we mix red and white, we get pink.
items.hint: 如果我们把红色和白色混合，就会得到粉色。

items.text: What happens when we mix blue and yellow?
items.hint: 当我们把蓝色和黄色混合会发生什么？

items.text: The magnet attracts the paper clip!
If we flip the magnet, the poles repel.
items.hint: 如果我们翻转磁铁，两极就会互相排斥。

items.text: Drop each object one by one
The cork floats because it is very light.
items.hint: 软木塞浮起来，因为它很轻。

items.text: If an object is heavy, it will sink.
items.hint: 如果物体很重，它就会沉下去。

items.text: Hold the lens up to the light
Look at a leaf under the glass
Everything looks so big through the lens!
items.hint: 透过镜片一切看起来好大啊！

items.text: If you use a lens, you can see tiny details.
items.hint: 如果你用镜片，就能看到微小的细节。
把每种液体倒得非常缓慢

items.text: Denser liquids sink to the bottom.
items.hint: 密度较大的液体会沉到底部。

items.text: If liquids have different densities, they form layers.
items.hint: 如果液体密度不同，它们就会分层。

items.text: Shine the torch on the wall
Move your hand to make shapes
Watch how the shadow changes size
items.hint: 观察影子大小如何变化

items.text: When light hits an object, it makes a shadow.
items.hint: 当光照射到物体上时，就会产生影子。

items.text: If the object is closer, the shadow becomes bigger.
items.hint: 如果物体越近，影子就会越大。

items.text: Press the seed gently into the soil
items.hint: 轻轻地把种子按进土里

items.text: Water it a little every day
Place it near a sunny window
items.hint: 把它放在阳光充足的窗边

items.text: Seeds need water and sunlight to grow.
items.hint: 种子需要水和阳光才能生长。

items.text: If we water it daily, it will grow much faster.
items.hint: 如果我们每天浇水，它会长得快很多。

items.text: Write down exactly what you saw
items.hint: 写下你准确观察到的内容
科学家总是记录他们的实验结果。

items.text: My conclusion is: if we add more water, it grows faster.
items.hint: 我的结论是：如果我们多浇水，它会长得更快。

items.text: Place your hand on your chest
Count the beats for ten seconds

items.hint: 现在跳一跳再检查一次

items.text: My heart beats faster because I was running.
items.hint: 我的心跳加快，因为我刚才在跑步。

items.text: If your heart is beating, you are alive!
items.hint: 如果你的心脏在跳动，你就是活着的！

items.text: Breathe in slowly through your nose
Breathe out slowly through your mouth
When you breathe in, your lungs fill with air.
items.hint: 当你吸气时，你的肺里充满了空气。

items.text: If you breathe deeply, you will feel much calmer.
items.hint: 如果你深呼吸，你会感觉平静很多。

items.text: Press your arm gently to feel the bone
items.hint: 轻轻按压手臂感受骨头

items.text: Count how many knuckles you have
Bones are hard because they support our whole body.
items.hint: 骨头是坚硬的，因为它们支撑我们整个身体。

items.text: If we had no bones, we could not stand up.
items.hint: 如果我们没有骨头，我们就站不起来。

items.text: Take a tiny taste and think
It tastes sour because it has a lot of acid.
items.hint: 它尝起来酸，因为里面有很多酸性物质。

items.text: If you add sugar, the sour taste will go away.
items.hint: 如果你加糖，酸味就会消失。

items.text: Try to guess the flower by smell
items.hint: 试试用气味猜出是什么花

items.text: It smells fresh because the flower has a lovely scent.
items.hint: 它闻起来清新，因为花朵有美丽的香味。

items.text: If we plant more flowers, the garden smells amazing.
items.hint: 如果我们多种花，花园闻起来会很棒。

items.text: Pour water into the ice cube tray
Put it in the freezer overnight
Check what happened in the morning
items.hint: 早上去看看发生了什么

items.text: Water turns into ice because it is very cold.
items.hint: 水变成冰，是因为温度非常低。

items.text: If the temperature drops below zero, water will freeze.
items.hint: 如果温度降到零度以下，水就会结冰。

items.text: Hold an ice cube in your warm hand
items.hint: 把冰块握在温暖的手里

items.text: Time how fast the ice melts
Ice melts because the temperature becomes warm.
items.hint: 冰融化了，因为温度变暖了。

items.text: If we heat the ice, it turns back into water.
items.hint: 如果我们加热冰，它就会重新变回水。

items.text: Look for the rainbow after the rain
Count the colours of the rainbow
Try to make a rainbow with a hose
A rainbow appears because sunlight passes through raindrops.
items.hint: 彩虹出现，是因为阳光穿过雨滴。

items.text: If there is no sunlight, we cannot see a rainbow.
items.hint: 如果没有阳光，我们就看不到彩虹。

items.text: Blow harder and see what changes
items.hint: 用力吹，看看会有什么变化

items.text: The windmill spins because the wind pushes the blades.
items.hint: 风车旋转，因为风推动了叶片。

items.text: If the wind blows harder, the windmill spins faster.
items.hint: 如果风吹得更大，风车就会转得更快。

items.text: Look at the moon every night this week
items.hint: 这周每天晚上都看看月亮

items.text: Draw the shape you see each night
items.hint: 把每晚看到的形状画下来

items.text: Compare your drawings at the end
The moon changes shape because we see different parts lit by the sun.
items.hint: 月亮形状变化，是因为我们看到太阳照射的不同部分。

items.text: If we watch every night, we can see the full moon cycle.
items.hint: 如果我们每晚观察，就能看到完整的月相变化。

items.text: Never look directly at the sun
Use special solar glasses to observe
items.hint: 用专用太阳眼镜来观察

items.text: Draw how big you think the sun is
items.hint: 画出你认为太阳有多大

items.text: The sun is so bright because it is a giant burning star.
items.hint: 太阳这么明亮，因为它是一颗巨大的燃烧恒星。

items.text: If there were no sun, there would be no life on Earth.
items.hint: 如果没有太阳，地球上就不会有生命。

items.text: Name the planets in order from the sun
items.hint: 按距离太阳的顺序说出各行星名称

items.text: Point to Earth on the solar system chart
items.hint: 在太阳系图上指出地球

items.text: All eight planets travel around the sun in their own orbit.
items.hint: 八大行星都沿着各自的轨道绕太阳运行。

items.text: Because Saturn has rings, it is easy to recognise.
items.hint: 因为土星有光环，所以很容易辨认。

items.text: Check your helmet is sealed tight
Make sure your oxygen tank is full
Move your arms to test the suit
We must wear a spacesuit because there is no air in space.
items.hint: 我们必须穿宇航服，因为太空里没有空气。

items.text: If the helmet is not sealed, the astronaut cannot breathe.
items.hint: 如果头盔没有密封，宇航员就无法呼吸。

items.text: Check all the buttons and screens
Sit up straight and hold on tight
Because the rocket uses fuel, it can reach the sky.
items.hint: 因为火箭使用燃料，所以它能飞上天空。
数到零时大喊点火升空！

items.text: Hold on tight for the launch
If the engines ignite, the rocket will leave Earth.
items.hint: 如果发动机点火，火箭就会离开地球。

items.text: Spread your arms and pretend to float
Move in slow motion like an astronaut
items.hint: 像宇航员一样慢动作移动

items.text: Describe how floating in space feels
items.hint: 描述在太空中飘浮的感觉

items.text: We float in space because there is no gravity.
items.hint: 我们在太空中飘浮，因为没有引力。

items.text: If there were gravity in space, we could not float.
items.hint: 如果太空中有引力，我们就无法飘浮了。

items.text: Look at Earth through the window
Find the blue ocean from up here
items.hint: 从这里找到蓝色的海洋

items.text: Promise to protect our beautiful home
items.hint: 承诺保护我们美丽的家园

items.text: Our home is beautiful because it has water and life.
items.hint: 我们的家园很美丽，因为它有水和生命。

items.text: If we don't protect Earth, we will lose our only home.
items.hint: 如果我们不保护地球，我们将失去唯一的家园。

items.text: Use your tool to pick up the rock
Place each sample in a sealed bag
items.hint: 把每个样本放入密封袋

items.text: Label where you found each rock
items.hint: 标记每块岩石的发现地点

items.text: The moon has craters because meteorites crashed into it.
items.hint: 月球有陨石坑，是因为陨石撞击了它。

items.text: If we study moon rocks, we learn about our solar system.
items.hint: 如果我们研究月球岩石，就能了解我们的太阳系。

items.text: Check the repair before going back
items.hint: 返回前检查修理是否完成

items.text: If the panel breaks, the station loses power.
items.hint: 如果面板损坏，空间站就会失去电力。

items.text: Because astronauts train hard, they can fix anything.
items.hint: 因为宇航员刻苦训练，他们能修好任何东西。

items.text: Tell everyone your biggest science dream
items.hint: 告诉大家你最大的科学梦想

items.text: Write your dream in your science diary
items.hint: 把你的梦想写进科学日记

items.text: Draw the planet you want to visit
items.hint: 画出你想去的那颗星球

items.text: I want to explore the whole universe one day!
items.hint: 我想有一天探索整个宇宙！

items.text: If I study hard, I can become a real scientist someday.
items.hint: 如果我努力学习，总有一天我能成为真正的科学家。
